title: tanacetum shiwogiku
intro: Tanacetum shiwogiku, also known as Japanese tansy, is a type of flowering plant in the sunflower family. It has been used in traditional Japanese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to reduce inflammation and alleviate pain. The plant's extracts have been found to have anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties, offering health benefits such as improved digestion, reduced fever, and relief from headaches. Tanacetum shiwogiku is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be taken internally to reap its medicinal benefits.
